question: Which fiscal year from 2011-2016 has the highest total approved authorization amount for FEMA Hazard Mitigation Assistance (HMA) grant program funded projects? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A policy analyst wants to see which fiscal year had the largest total export finance approvals in the mid-2010s.

1.fact: Filtering Decision = "Approved" and summing Approved/Declined Amount by Fiscal Year for 2011-2016, the highest total is in 2012 at 35784343173.23.
1.subquestion: Which fiscal year from 2011-2016 has the highest total approved authorization amount for FEMA Hazard Mitigation Assistance (HMA) grant program funded projects? (Filter Decision == "Approved"; sum Approved/Declined Amount by Fiscal Year; select the maximum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which fiscal year from 2011-2016 has the highest total approved amount? (Filter Decision == "Approved"; sum Approved/Declined Amount by Fiscal Year; select the maximum.) The answer is 2012.
